dag.dag_name: Facility import concurrent update RCA for PRB0054923

tasks.dependencies: DAG entry point for PRB0054923 / INC6594187 RCA replay.
Fetch execution-log rows for FACILITY-IMPORT-D / TASK-PLIM-FACILITY-IMPORT-E around the failed 2026-07-03 PST run window.

operator_config.sql:
SELECT interface_name, task_name, status, start_ts, end_ts, error_message
FROM PLIM_UTILS.EXECUTION_LOG
WHERE interface_name = 'FACILITY-IMPORT-D'
  AND task_name = 'TASK-PLIM-FACILITY-IMPORT-E'
  AND start_ts >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-03 03:00:00'
  AND start_ts < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-03 03:05:00'
ORDER BY start_ts DESC;

tasks.dependencies: Check for tuple-concurrently-updated / row-lock conflict signatures in execution log evidence.

operator_config.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS concurrent_update_conflict_count
FROM PLIM_UTILS.EXECUTION_LOG
WHERE interface_name = 'FACILITY-IMPORT-D'
  AND task_name = 'TASK-PLIM-FACILITY-IMPORT-E'
  AND start_ts >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-03 03:00:00'
  AND start_ts < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-03 03:05:00'
  AND (
    LOWER(COALESCE(error_message, '')) LIKE '%tuple concurrently updated%'
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(error_message, '')) LIKE '%concurrent update%'
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(error_message, '')) LIKE '%could not serialize%'
  );

tasks.dependencies: Persist RCA narrative: PostgreSQL row-level concurrent update conflict on PLIM_UTILS.EXECUTION_LOG caused transaction abort.
Notify facility/vendor/location stakeholders of PRB0054923 findings and preventive actions.

incident.incident_name: DAG failures due to concurrent updates on the same row
incident.description: FACILITY-IMPORT-D failed on 2026-07-03 when TASK-PLIM-FACILITY-IMPORT-E aborted after a PostgreSQL tuple-concurrently-updated conflict.
incident.symptoms: PythonOperator task failed on try 1 after 22.289021 seconds; log indicated Tuple concurrently updated while acquiring a pessimistic lock on PLIM_UTILS.EXECUTION_LOG.
incident.root_cause: The batch framework allows multiple processes or retries to access and update the same PLIM_UTILS.EXECUTION_LOG record simultaneously, creating a race condition during lock acquisition.
incident.business_impact: Facility, Vendor & Location import pipeline failure required incident investigation and delayed normal batch processing until the next DAG run completed.
incident.resolution: Next DAG run completed; investigate overlapping schedulers/retries, serialize execution log updates, and add retry handling for row-level concurrent update conflicts.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify PostgreSQL row-level concurrency conflict (Tuple concurrently updated) on PLIM_UTILS.EXECUTION_LOG for FACILITY-IMPORT-D / TASK-PLIM-FACILITY-IMPORT-E as the immediate failure cause.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task log, PostgreSQL execution log records, Splunk log search for Tuple concurrently updated, scheduler overlap history, retry timeline.
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Task TASK-PLIM-FACILITY-IMPORT-E failed on try 1 from 2026-07-03 03:01:37 AM PST to 03:02:00 AM PST with PythonOperator failure.
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Optional: scheduler concurrency, task overlap, database lock/wait metrics, and PostgreSQL transaction abort counts around the run window.
expected_rca.resolution: Ensure only one scheduler instance triggers the interface at a time; strengthen pessimistic-lock retry handling; serialize EXECUTION_LOG updates for the same interface.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add monitor for overlapping FACILITY-IMPORT-D executions and PostgreSQL tuple-concurrently-updated signatures; enforce unique active execution-log ownership per interface run.
